hpp.objects.redwoodObservatoryElvenSharp:
{Redwood Observatory}

The observatory reveals the surrounding lands. From this high vantage point, your Grand Elves master unmatched precision and become Sharpshooters.

{Redwood Observatory}

The observatory reveals the surrounding lands. From this high vantage point, your Wood Elves refine their discipline and rise as Grand Elves.
